message:
feat(persist): stream entry decoding from upstream listpacks (br-frankenredis-hjub, s5su part c)

Populate RdbValue::Stream entries by walking each radix-tree macro node
listpack: decode the master entry (count, deleted, field count, master
fields, terminator) then every per-entry tuple (flags, ms/seq deltas,
optional field names, values, lp_count). Handle the SAMEFIELDS shortcut
against the master, skip DELETED tombstones, and fold deltas into the
node_key master ID.

Consumer-group population remains byte-parsed only — tracked under
br-frankenredis-qi6z.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
